step_1_catalyst.catalyst_event: Geely 1H 2026 interim results — key disclosure of Galaxy/Zeekr brand consolidation synergies, EV gross margin trajectory, and full-year volume guidance revision after Q1 2026 record monthly deliveries
step_1_catalyst.catalyst_source: HKEX filing schedule; management Q4 2025 call indicated Zeekr privatization synergies to be quantified at interim

mechanism_chain: 1. Zeekr privatization (completed late 2025) eliminates duplicate R&D/procurement/channel spend → consolidated EV opex ratio compresses
2. Galaxy series ramp (E5, E8, Starship 7) hitting 80k+ monthly run-rate at higher ASP than Geometry → blended EV gross margin lifts from low-single-digit to high-single-digit
3. Group-level operating margin expands beyond reported 5.0% (live data) toward 7-8% as EV losses narrow while ICE/HEV (Geely + Lynk) remain profitable
4. 1H 2026 print delivers OP margin +200bp YoY surprise → consensus FY2026 NI revised from flat (~16.9B, per our data) to +25-35% growth
5. Re-rating: stock currently 8.6x fwd P/E (live) — peer EV-exposed names trade 12-15x; gap closes on guidance raise → multiple expansion + earnings upgrade compound

evidence_quantitative: FY2025 NI 16.9B vs FY2023 5.3B (per data context) — 3.2x in two years, demonstrating completed scale inflection
FY2025 NI YoY only +0.2% (16.9B vs 16.8B, per data context) — masks underlying mix shift as one-time Zeekr deconsolidation gains in 2024 normalize out
Live Rev growth TTM 15.6%, ROE 16.0%, Op margin 5.0% (live fundamentals) — operating leverage room vs Toyota ~10% / BYD ~6%
Stock +40.8% over last 60d (16.15 → 22.74, per OHLC data) at 73% of 52W range — momentum confirms early phase of re-rating, not exhausted
Fwd P/E 8.6x vs TTM 12.2x (live) implies consensus already models ~42% earnings growth — but mean target 29.36 (29.1% upside, 25 analysts) suggests Street has not fully priced through
evidence_qualitative: Zeekr take-private removes US-listing overhang and minority leakage — structural change, not cyclical
Geely Galaxy brand has emerged as #2 Chinese new-energy brand by retail volume in Q1 2026 [external estimate, not in our data context — to verify via CAAM]
Management has executed the 'one Geely' streamlining ahead of original 2026 timeline — credibility for further guidance

market_consensus.e: Bulls: Geely is a cheap EV-leveraged play with completed restructuring; 29% upside to consensus TP justified by volume growth. Bears: Auto price war in China is structural; 17% gross margin (live) is too thin; FY2025 NI flat (+0.2%) signals growth has peaked.
market_consensus.z: 多头：吉利是已完成重组的廉价EV杠杆标的，29%上涨空间合理。空头：中国汽车价格战是结构性的；17%毛利率太薄；2025年净利润仅+0.2%意味着增长见顶。

our_variant.e: Both camps miss that the +0.2% NI flatness in FY2025 is a base-effect artifact (FY2024 contained Zeekr deconsolidation one-offs). Underlying operating NI is accelerating, and 1H 2026 will reveal this when the comp normalizes — driving a consensus earnings reset upward.
our_variant.z: 多空都忽略了2025年净利润+0.2%是基数效应假象（2024年含极氪剥离一次性收益）。潜在经营净利润正在加速，2026年中报基数正常化后将显现，驱动卖方盈利预测上修。

contrarian_view.what_changes_our_mind: 1H 2026 interim results show consolidated gross margin <17.0% (i.e., flat or down vs current TTM) AND operating margin <5.5% — would signal price-war pressure overwhelmed Zeekr synergy benefits, invalidating the operating leverage thesis.

step_5_proves_right_if: 1H 2026 interim NI ≥10.5B CNY (implying ≥24% YoY on clean comparable base)
Group consolidated operating margin in 1H 2026 ≥6.5% (vs 5.0% live TTM)
Management raises FY2026 volume guidance by ≥5% at interim or quarterly update
Consensus FY2026 EPS revised up by ≥10% within 30 days of interim release
step_6_proves_wrong_if: 1H 2026 group gross margin <17.0% (flat or down vs current TTM 17.0%)
Monthly EV deliveries (Galaxy + Zeekr combined) decline QoQ for two consecutive months in 2H 2026
Geely loses ≥300bp NEV market share to BYD QoQ (per watchlist wrongIf signal)

step_7_variant_view.variant_view_one_sentence: Market believes FY2025 NI flatness (+0.2%) means growth has peaked → We believe it's a one-off base effect masking accelerating operating earnings → Mechanism is Zeekr consolidation synergies + Galaxy mix lift surfacing in clean 1H 2026 comparables.

expected_pnl_asymmetry.upside_if_right: +30% to +45% (target 29.5-33.0 HKD on 11-13x fwd P/E × upgraded EPS)
expected_pnl_asymmetry.downside_if_wrong: -15% to -20% (downside floor 18.0-19.5 HKD on 7x trough multiple if margin disappoints)

why_market_keeps_buying: Stock has run +40.8% in 60 days (per OHLC) — momentum + China policy stimulus narrative supports continued inflows
Cheap 8.6x fwd P/E (live) keeps valuation-driven buyers anchored despite price-war fears
25 analyst coverage with 29% mean upside (live) provides sell-side air cover
early_signs_phase_1_weakening: Monthly wholesale data (CAAM, ~7th of month) shows Galaxy brand sequential decline >5% in May or June 2026
BYD or Xpeng announces aggressive price cut targeting Galaxy E5/E8 segment
Stock fails to hold 22.0 HKD support on broad market down days (relative weakness signal)

optional_long_play.exit_trigger: If 1H 2026 interim disappoints (GM <17% or OP margin <5.5%) OR if monthly volume rolls over for 2 consecutive months

catalyst_for_reversion: 1H 2026 interim results (~2026-08-20): operating margin reveal — bull case if ≥6.5%, bear case if <5.5%
FY2026 guidance update at interim: volume target raise ≥5% confirms thesis; cut signals price-war damage
Q3 2026 monthly delivery cadence (October data): confirms whether 2H ramp materializes
phase_2_reality_recognition.estimated_timing: 1H 2026 interim ~2026-08-20; full confirmation by Q3 2026 monthly data (~2026-11-07)

short_play.sizing: N/A — our variant is constructive, not bearish
short_play.entry_trigger: Only flip short if 1H 2026 GM <17% AND volume rolling over — would indicate price-war thesis dominant

position_sizing_curve.phase_1_weakening_confirmed: 10-15% (trim if early weakening signs appear before interim)
position_sizing_curve.phase_2_catalyst_imminent: 60-80% (scale up into August interim if monthly data confirms; or 0% if disconfirms)

data.name: 吉利汽车
data.mktcap: ~229B HKD [external estimate, not in our data context]

pulse.e: FY2025 NI flatness (+0.2%) is a base-effect artifact from FY2024 Zeekr one-offs; clean 1H 2026 comparables should reveal +25%+ underlying earnings acceleration, driving consensus reset and re-rating from 8.6x fwd P/E. Reward-to-risk ~2.3:1 over 3.5 months.
pulse.z: 2025年净利润+0.2%是2024年极氪剥离一次性收益造成的基数假象；2026年中报干净基数应显现+25%以上潜在盈利加速，驱动卖方预测上修与从8.6倍前瞻PE的估值重估。3.5个月期限风险回报比~2.3:1。

problem.e: Chinese auto OEM straddling ICE legacy and EV transition; needed to consolidate fragmented brand portfolio (Geely / Lynk / Zeekr / Galaxy / Geometry / Volvo / Polestar / Lotus) to compete with vertically-integrated BYD.
problem.z: 中国整车厂跨越燃油传承与电动转型；需整合碎片化品牌组合（吉利/领克/极氪/银河/几何/沃尔沃/极星/路特斯）以对抗垂直一体化的比亚迪。

mechanism.e: Zeekr privatization (late 2025) + Galaxy mainstreaming + shared SEA/Hi platform architecture → consolidated R&D scale, unified procurement, and EV gross margin lift from low-single to high-single digits.
mechanism.z: 极氪私有化（2025年末）+银河主流化+共享SEA/浩瀚平台架构→研发规模整合、采购统一、EV毛利从低个位数升至高个位数。

moneyFlow.e: ICE/HEV (Geely + Lynk) generate cash; EV (Galaxy + Zeekr) consume narrowing losses; group-level OP margin 5.0% (live) with room to 7-8% as EV reaches scale breakeven.
moneyFlow.z: 燃油/混动（吉利+领克）产生现金；EV（银河+极氪）亏损收窄；集团层经营利润率5.0%（实时数据），EV达规模盈亏平衡后有望升至7-8%。

marketBelieves.e: FY2025 NI flatness (+0.2%) confirms peak earnings; 17% gross margin too thin for sustained profit growth amid China auto price war.
marketBelieves.z: 2025年净利润+0.2%确认盈利见顶；17%毛利率在中国汽车价格战中太薄难以维持利润增长。

weBelieve.e: FY2025 flatness is a one-off base effect from FY2024 Zeekr deconsolidation gains; underlying operating earnings are accelerating and will surface in clean 1H 2026 comparables.
weBelieve.z: 2025年增长持平是2024年极氪剥离一次性收益的基数效应；潜在经营盈利正在加速，将在2026年中报干净基数中显现。

mechanism.e: Zeekr privatization synergies (R&D/procurement/channel dedup) + Galaxy mix shift to higher-ASP E5/E8/Starship 7 → group OP margin expands ≥150bp YoY in 1H 2026 → consensus FY2026 EPS revised up ≥10%.
mechanism.z: 极氪私有化协同（研发/采购/渠道去重）+银河向高均价E5/E8/星舰7的产品组合切换→2026年中报集团经营利润率同比扩张≥150基点→卖方2026年EPS预测上修≥10%。

rightIf.e: 1H 2026 interim shows group OP margin ≥6.5% AND NI ≥10.5B CNY AND management raises FY volume guide ≥5%.
rightIf.z: 2026年中报集团经营利润率≥6.5%且净利润≥105亿且管理层全年销量指引上调≥5%。

wrongIf.e: 1H 2026 gross margin <17.0% OR operating margin <5.5% → reduce position to 0-10% and re-evaluate price-war thesis.
wrongIf.z: 2026年中报毛利率<17.0%或经营利润率<5.5%→减仓至0-10%并重新评估价格战逻辑。

whatChangesOurMind.e: 1H 2026 interim shows consolidated gross margin <17.0% AND operating margin <5.5% — would signal price-war pressure overwhelmed Zeekr synergy benefits, invalidating operating leverage thesis.
whatChangesOurMind.z: 2026年中报合并毛利率<17.0%且经营利润率<5.5%——表明价格战压力压倒极氪协同效应，经营杠杆逻辑失效。

rewardToRisk.upsideIfRight: +30% to +45% (target 29.5-33.0 HKD on 11-13x fwd P/E × upgraded EPS) over 3-4 months

whyMarketKeepsBuying: Stock +40.8% in 60d (per OHLC data) — momentum + China stimulus narrative continues attracting flows
Cheap 8.6x fwd P/E (live) anchors valuation buyers despite price-war concerns
25 analysts with 29% mean upside provides sell-side support
earlySignsPhase1Weakening: CAAM monthly data (~7th of each month) shows Galaxy sequential decline >5% in May/June 2026
BYD/Xpeng announces aggressive price cut targeting Galaxy E5/E8 segment
Stock fails to hold 22.0 HKD on broad market down days (relative weakness)

optionalLongPlay.exitTrigger: 1H 2026 interim disappoints (GM <17% or OP margin <5.5%) OR monthly volume rolls over 2 consecutive months

catalystForReversion: 1H 2026 interim ~2026-08-20: OP margin reveal — bull if ≥6.5%, bear if <5.5%
FY2026 guidance update at interim: volume raise ≥5% confirms; cut signals damage
Q3 2026 monthly delivery cadence (October data ~2026-11-07): confirms 2H ramp
phase2RealityRecognition.estimatedTiming: 1H 2026 interim ~2026-08-20; full confirmation by Q3 2026 monthly data ~2026-11-07

shortPlay.sizing: N/A — variant is constructive, not bearish
shortPlay.entryTrigger: Only flip short if 1H 2026 GM <17% AND volume rolling over

positionSizingCurve.phase2CatalystImminent: 60-80% (scale up if data confirms; 0% if disconfirms)

catalysts.e: 1H 2026 interim results — OP margin & guidance reveal
catalysts.z: 2026年中报——经营利润率与指引揭示

catalysts.e: Monthly CAAM wholesale data (Galaxy + Zeekr volume tracking)
catalysts.z: 中汽协月度批发数据（银河+极氪销量跟踪）

catalysts.e: Potential FY2026 volume guidance raise at investor day
catalysts.z: 投资者日潜在2026全年销量指引上调

catalysts.e: Q3 2026 monthly delivery confirmation of 2H ramp
catalysts.z: Q3 2026月度交付确认下半年爬坡

expectation_gap.e: FY2025 NI flatness anchors low expectations; clean 1H 2026 comparables likely reset consensus higher.
expectation_gap.z: 2025净利润持平锚定低预期；2026中报干净基数可能重置共识上行。

fundamental_acc.e: Underlying op earnings accelerating; ROE 16% (live) and 15.6% rev growth support thesis.
fundamental_acc.z: 潜在经营盈利加速；ROE 16%与15.6%收入增长支撑逻辑。

narrative_shift.e: From 'fragmented also-ran' to 'consolidated #2 NEV brand' — narrative re-rating in early innings.
narrative_shift.z: 从'碎片化跟随者'到'整合后的#2新能源品牌'——叙事重估处于初期。

low_coverage.z: 25位分析师覆盖——覆盖充分，限制意外因素。

risks.e: China NEV price war intensifies; BYD targets Galaxy E5/E8 directly with sub-100k RMB pricing
risks.z: 中国新能源价格战加剧；比亚迪以10万以下定价直接针对银河E5/E8

risks.e: EU tariff escalation on China-made EVs cuts Polestar/Volvo/Zeekr export profitability
risks.z: 欧盟对中国产电动车关税升级削减极星/沃尔沃/极氪出口盈利

risks.e: Zeekr integration costs higher than guided; one-off charges suppress 1H 2026 op margin
risks.z: 极氪整合成本高于指引；一次性费用压制2026中报经营利润率

risks.e: Battery raw material (lithium) price spike compresses already-thin 17% gross margin
risks.z: 电池原材料（锂）价格上涨压缩本已偏薄的17%毛利

crowd.e: Stock at 73% of 52W range with +40.8% 60d run — momentum crowd partially in; valuation crowd still positioned given 8.6x fwd P/E.
crowd.z: 股价处于52周高点73%且60日+40.8%——动量资金部分进入；考虑8.6倍前瞻PE，价值资金仍有配置空间。

nextActions.e: Track CAAM monthly Galaxy + Zeekr wholesale volumes (~7th of each month) — flag if Galaxy sequential decline >5%
nextActions.z: 跟踪中汽协月度银河+极氪批发销量（每月~7日）——银河环比下降>5%时警示

nextActions.e: Build channel checks on Galaxy E5/E8/Starship 7 dealer pricing in Tier 1-2 cities — detect early discount creep
nextActions.z: 建立一二线城市银河E5/E8/星舰7经销商定价渠道调研——检测早期折扣蔓延

nextActions.e: Model 1H 2026 OP margin scenarios: bull 6.5-7%, base 5.8-6.2%, bear <5.5% — set position sizing triggers
nextActions.z: 建模2026中报经营利润率情景：乐观6.5-7%，基准5.8-6.2%，悲观<5.5%——设置仓位触发器

nextActions.e: Monitor BYD price actions and Xpeng/Li Auto monthly deliveries for competitive intensity gauge
nextActions.z: 监控比亚迪价格行动与小鹏/理想月度交付以判断竞争强度

fin.rev: not available in our data (FY2025 NI 16.9B per data context)

fin_insights: NI/Rev growth ratio FY2025: NI +0.2% / Rev +15.6% = 0.01x — appears as severe negative operating leverage, BUT this is base-effect distorted (FY2024 contained Zeekr deconsolidation one-offs). Clean 2-year stack (FY2023→FY2025: 5.3B→16.9B) shows 3.2x, true underlying NI/Rev ratio likely >1.5x.

Profit scissors: 17.0% gross margin and 5.0% operating margin (live) imply ~12pp opex ratio — compared to 25 analyst target implying mean ~6-7% op margin in FY2026, the operating leverage tightening expected by Street is +100-200bp expansion.

Implied growth check: At 8.6x fwd P/E (live) reverting to peer 13.5x in 3yr requires only ~16% EPS CAGR — well within Geely's demonstrated capability (NI 5.3B→16.9B in 2 years). Valuation has built-in upside cushion.

Stock at 73% of 52W range and +40.8% over 60d (per OHLC) with buyback only 0.3B in FY2025 (per data) — current rally is fundamental/sentiment driven, not buyback supported. Implies organic demand for shares, more durable but more volatile.
